# agent-skills

Cross-platform AI agent skills for regulated industries and underserved markets.

## What

Open-source repository of high-quality SKILL.md files compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, and Cline.

## Focus Areas

- EU regulatory compliance (AI Act, NIS2, DORA, GDPR)
- French professional skills (accounting PCG/FEC, notary, property management)
- Skill security and auditing
- Agent evaluation and testing
- Open data exploitation (France, EU)
- Offline/frugal computing (Africa, low-bandwidth)
- Document processing (invoices, contracts, forms)

## Install

npx skills add BuilderCed/agent-skills
npx skills add BuilderCed/agent-skills --skill eu-ai-act-compliance

## Format

Each skill follows the SKILL.md open standard with YAML frontmatter.
Skills are written in natural language for maximum cross-platform compatibility.
Platform-specific extensions (hooks, agents, MCP) are in subdirectories.
